title: Web Development
text: Developed responsive web applications using MongoDB, Express, React, and Node.js with optimized API integration.

title: AI & Computer Vision
text: Designed and implemented real-time computer vision systems, such as face mask compliance detection.

title: Machine Learning
text: Engineered predictive models (e.g. Fake News detection using TF-IDF and Naive Bayes) and interactive web applications.

title: Data Analytics & BI
text: Created interactive dashboards to visualize key metrics, KPI trends, and business performance analytics.
